title: SpaceX’s IPO Triumph, Anthropic’s Fable Fumble, OpenAI’s Price War
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss SpaceX's IPO success, its implications for OpenAI and Anthropic, Anthropic's troubled Fable product launch, and OpenAI's potential price cuts. They debate whether AI models are becoming commodities and discuss Apple's Siri evolution.
writeup: This weekly news discussion runs through SpaceX's IPO valuation and what it signals for AI competitors, Anthropic's Fable product rollout and its marketing approach, and OpenAI's potential price cuts. The hosts debate whether AI models are commoditizing, framing the conversation around pricing strategy and product focus across the major AI companies. Apple's Siri integration also factors into the discussion of the competitive landscape.
